description.p: The vampiric blood within you has solidified, sharpening the predatory nature that has always lurked beneath the surface.
The ancient vampiric heritage within your blood has fully awakened, granting you the following benefits:

ul.li: Your Vampiric Bite damage die increases from a d4 to a d8.
You gain resistance to necrotic damage.
Your creature type becomes both Humanoid and Undead. You are affected by spells and abilities that target either type.

sheet.description: Your Vampiric Bite damage die increases to a d8. You have resistance to necrotic damage. You are considered both Humanoid and Undead for the purposes of spells and effects.
